subtitle: Manage permanent partner agreements. Partners use the Cable Partner app to confirm PTR transactions.
cablePartnerHint: Partners use the Cable Partner app to look up and confirm PTR codes. Here you create and manage partner agreements (commission, points, code expiry).
deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this partner agreement? The provider will no longer be able to confirm new PTR transactions.
invalidAmount: Amount must be greater than zero
invalidCreditLimit: Credit limit must be a positive number
